features: Keeps shoes fresh, dry and odour free
Regular use help's to protect, condition and prolong shoe life
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas odour control shoe spray is specially formulated to keep shoes and trainers fresh and odour free all day. With a special combination of anti-bacterial and anti-fungal ingredients agents to control and neutralise bacteria and fungi in the shoe. Keeps shoes fresh, dry and odour free. Regular use help's to protect, condition and prolong shoe life. Directions Shake the bottle well before use. Spray the odour control shoe spray inside the shoes, targeting areas with odor or moisture. Allow the spray to dry before wearing the shoes.
